steps.title: Set up
steps.content:
Parallel lines have equal slopes. For $ax+by=c$ the slope is $-a/b$.
Line $j$: $3x+4y=28$ → slope $= -3/4$.
Line $k$: $24x+ry=24$ → slope $= -24/r$.
Set them equal: $$-\frac{3}{4}=-\frac{24}{r}$$

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: $$3r=96 \implies r=32$$Line $k$ is $24x+32y=24$. Plug in the point $(0,b)$:$$32b=24 \implies b=\frac{3}{4}$$
